turns.say: What's the one-line state of the org right now?
What did we ship most recently on Jinn Talk?
Ask the team to quickly confirm whether the Project A blog cron jobs are enabled. Read-only, one line back, do not change or send anything.
Now also have someone check how many employees are in the org and report just the number. Read-only.
And one more: have the team name the single highest-priority department. Read-only, one word.
So overall, anything I should worry about today?
